Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-04-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft For Order: 1) Compelling Response To Request For Prodction Of Documents [Ccp 2031.300(B)]; And 2) For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount $1,200.00 Against Pltf, Kimberly Davis[Ccp 2031.300(C)];
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE:
Mark M. Senior, Esq., for defendant and moving party: The Hertz Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant The Hertz Corporation's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $310 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Order: 1) To Compel Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories [Ccp 2030.290(B)]; And 2) For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,200.00 Against Pltf, Kimberly Davis [Ccp 2030.290(C)];
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE:
Mark M. Senior, Esq., for defendant and moving party: The Hertz Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant The Hertz Corporation's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $310 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
